title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Equitas Small Finance Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!
